special_mechanics.name: Side-scrolling platformer movement
special_mechanics.description: Game uses side-scrolling camera with platformer elements similar to Zelda II, departing from top-down camera of previous Ys games

special_mechanics.name: Manual attack input
special_mechanics.description: Auto-attack removed; player must press button to make protagonist Adol attack enemies

tier_notes: Tier 3 (empirical/qualitative): No detailed movement physics documentation available in sources. Wikipedia article focuses on narrative, gameplay systems (equipment, experience, magic), and historical information rather than technical movement parameters. TCRF source inaccessible per robots.txt restrictions.
sources_used: Wikipedia - Ys III: Wanderers from Ys
